---
title: "Charlotte Frances Mason"
---

## Charlotte Frances Mason

**Dates:** (1820/1-25 Sept 1860)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

Daughter of the Rev. Charles Yonge of Eton College, she married (9 Nov 1840) the Rev. John Mason (d. 1874).  Yonge calls her ‘Eton Charlotte’. [<i>Gentleman's Magazine; LG</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
